title: Enforced Forgetting
description: Detects when memory is deliberately erased or rewritten by dominant powers, shaping what is remembered and what is lost.
indicators: Removal of historical data from public archives
Propaganda redefining or erasing collective memory
Institutional amnesia imposed by control systems
